name: Form
description: This component will only render the fields by itself. For creating a new form you will need to create an excel file which will contain the fields, for each field its input type, a label(representing each field’s content),a default column which will render placeholders, a required column containing true for required attributes, a value column for which will contain either links to a file or in the buttons case its text and and if there is the case the file which will handle the submission with its source . A form can be inserted into the page like any block and it will only contain the link to the form’s data.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Primary authored content. Follow the sidekick block page for the exact table/content shape and examples.

usageNotes: In this example the form block validates the email adress and that the terms have been accepted and then starts the scan.
Note: the scan process is handled by the file designed to do so not by this block.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
